generated_oml:
instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor embedded in the thermal incubator system for monitoring internal temperature in laboratory settings"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Transmission of temperature data from physical sensor to RabbitMQ server"
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements collected from the incubator's physical system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance ThermalDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations to represent thermal dynamics of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CyberPhysicalSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated model combining physical components and control logic for the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, Optimizer
]

instance CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design tool for geometric modeling of the incubator's physical structure"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PhysicsSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation engine for thermal dynamics modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for communication between physical and virtual components using RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, SimulationService, ControlService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating model parameters based on sensor data calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting anomalies in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state using sensor data and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, ControlService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing thermal control parameters to ensure operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, ControlService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time safety and performance monitoring using sensor data and model checks"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected, FaultDetected
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating and predicting incubator behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureProfile
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing system-wide thermal control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTemperatureSetpoint
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for triggering interventions when safety violations are detected"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlActionTriggered
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating temperature deviation beyond safe operational limits"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of system fault based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance PredictedTemperatureProfile : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trajectory based on simulation models"
]

instance OptimalTemperatureSetpoint : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal temperature setting for efficient operation of the incubator"
]

instance ControlActionTriggered : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action to adjust heatbed or controller settings upon safety violation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorPhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system operating in laboratory settings for biological sample storage"
    base:contains Heatbed, EmbeddedController, TemperatureSensor
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element responsible for thermal regulation in the incubator system"
]

instance EmbeddedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded controller managing heatbed operation and RabbitMQ communication"
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical temperature sensor measuring internal incubator temperature"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to RabbitMQ for commands to control the fan and heatbed, issuing heating signals to activate the heatbed. Command execution is confirmed, though validation, authentication, feedback, and conflict resolution mechanisms are not specified."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that adjust parameters using sensor data, with validation via monitoring systems that check safety and operational optimality. Error detection mechanisms identify violations, triggering corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes a 1-Wire bus for sensor connectivity and a RabbitMQ server for synchronization and communication. The deployment includes a Raspberry Pi hosting RabbitMQ, though network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server is hosted on a Raspberry Pi, indicating on-premise edge deployment. RabbitMQ supports deployment on premises and in the cloud, though computational requirements, storage specifics, scalability mechanisms, and availability assurances are not provided."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs monitoring mechanisms to continuously assess the Physical Twin's safety and operational optimality. When violations are detected, human operators or automated algorithms initiate corrective actions to the Physical Twin to maintain system integrity."
]
